ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: whole oats (37%), dark chocolate (12%) [cacao, sugar, natural vanilla aroma, emulsifiers (soy lecithin, polyglycerol polyricinoleate)] , sunflower oil, sugar, whole wheat (9,6%) glucose syrup, oligofructose, rice and wheat flours (1,9%), dried coconut, molasses, salt, cinnamon, caramelized sugar, aromas, antioxidant (tocopherol)
